iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 21 Hour 00 update. DETERRENT. Pezeshkian: not pursuing nukes, leader declared forbidden. DNI confirms enrichment 'obliterated'. Updated 2026-03-21T00:00:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 21 Hour 00 update. IMMINENT. Trump 'winding down' rhetoric vs more Marines deployed. F-35 emergency landing (possible Iranian hit). Trump calls NATO 'cowards'. Netanyahu signals ground component. Hormuz still closed. Brent ~$108-112. Updated 2026-03-21T00:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Trump says US considering 'winding down' Iran war (NYT)
latest_news.text: Trump posts on social media that US is considering 'winding down' the war — contradicting his earlier 'no ceasefire' stance from same day. Significant de-escalation signal.

latest_news.headline: UAE arrests 5 members of Iran/Hezbollah-linked terror network
latest_news.text: UAE detains 5 members of 'terrorist network' linked to Iran and Hezbollah that used business fronts to infiltrate economy as part of 'coordinated external plan'.

latest_news.headline: UK warns Iran: targeting UK bases = aggression
latest_news.text: UK FM Cooper warns Iran against targeting UK territory. Iran FM Araghchi told Cooper that US use of British bases would be 'participation in aggression'. Rising UK-Iran tensions.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 81% (stable). Day 21 Hour 00 update. IMMINENT. Ground ops continuing. Hezbollah destroys 6 Merkava tanks. 1M+ displaced. 1,001 killed. France Barrot pushes ceasefire. Updated 2026-03-21T00:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Hezbollah destroys 6 Israeli Merkava tanks in southern Lebanon
latest_news.text: Hezbollah claims destruction of 6 Israeli Merkava tanks during attempted advance into Taybeh towards Deir Siryan area. Stiff ground resistance slowing Israeli advance.

latest_news.headline: Israeli strikes kill 10 in central Beirut, hospital ICU damaged
latest_news.text: At least 10 killed in central Beirut airstrike. Hospital ICU damaged in Nabatieh. Wide-scale shelling of southern Lebanon towns. 1M+ displaced.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 4% (stable). Day 21 Hour 00 update. DETERRENT. No new developments. 3 NATO Patriots at Incirlik. NATO rules out Article 5. Updated 2026-03-21T00:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

india.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 6% (stable). Day 21 Hour 00 update. DETERRENT. No new developments. Updated 2026-03-21T00:00:00Z

russia.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 14% (up). Day 21 Hour 00 update. DETERRENT (up). Russia supplying Verba MANPADS + Shahed drones to Iran (ISW). Estonia summons Russian diplomat after fighter jet violated Baltic airspace Mar 18. No direct intervention. Updated 2026-03-21T00:00:00Z

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 35% (up). Day 21 Hour 00 update. CRITICAL (up). Peace talks 'situational pause' due to Iran. Putin eyes new offensive to exploit US distraction. Zelensky sends delegation to US for Mar 21 talks. Russia not attending. DNI Gabbard: Russia 'maintains upper hand'. Updated 2026-03-21T00:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Kremlin confirms Ukraine peace talks on pause - 'situational' due to Iran war
latest_news.text: Kremlin says pause in Ukraine peace talks is 'situational' due to Iran conflict consuming US bandwidth. Kyiv says new meeting planned. Zelensky sends negotiating team to US for Saturday talks despite pause.

latest_news.headline: Gabbard tells Senate: Russia 'maintains upper hand' in Ukraine war
latest_news.text: DNI Gabbard testifies Russia 'maintained the upper hand' in Ukraine war. Moscow likely to continue war of attrition until agreement reached. Putin says open to peace but actions contradict.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 35% (stable). Day 21 Hour 00 update. CRITICAL. Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 23. TTP 3-day truce active. Post-Eid resumption expected. Updated 2026-03-21T00:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 21 Hour 00. DE-ESCALATION: Trump 'winding down' rhetoric. Netanyahu halts energy strikes. US eases Iranian oil sanctions. Khamenei conciliatory Nowruz. Pezeshkian: no nukes. ESCALATION: More Marines + amphibious ship deployed. Netanyahu signals ground component. Trump NATO 'cowards'. Putin eyes new Ukraine offensive. Hormuz still closed. Iran 'zero restraint'. MIXED — rhetoric vs posture contradiction.

latest_news.headline: Trump calls NATO allies 'cowards' for not helping open Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: Trump posts 'COWARDS, and we will REMEMBER!' about NATO allies refusing Hormuz coalition. Without America alliance is 'paper tiger'. Alliance fracture deepening.

latest_news.headline: Trump says US considering 'winding down' Iran war
latest_news.text: Trump posts US considering 'winding down' the war — contradicting earlier no-ceasefire stance. Major de-escalation signal.

latest_news.headline: US F-35 makes emergency landing after Iran combat — possible first jet hit
latest_news.text: US F-35 made emergency landing after combat over Iran. Reports aircraft may have been struck by Iranian fire — would be first US jet hit in war.

latest_news.headline: Netanyahu signals ground component to Iran war
latest_news.text: Netanyahu: 'You can't do revolutions from the air... there has to be a ground component.' First explicit ground ops mention. Also says war 'ending faster than people think.'

latest_news.headline: Putin eyes new offensive as Ukraine peace talks stall
latest_news.text: With US-brokered Ukraine talks on hold due to Iran, Putin expected to expand military gains via new offensives.

latest_news.headline: Estonia summons Russia after Baltic airspace violation
latest_news.text: Estonia summons Russian diplomat after Russian fighter violated Estonian airspace Mar 18. NATO-Russia tensions rising.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 21, 00:00 UTC) — IMMINENT: Iran war Day 21. Trump 'winding down' rhetoric vs Marines deployment. NATO 'cowards' — alliance fracture. F-35 possibly hit. Netanyahu signals ground component. Hormuz closed. Brent $108-112. Putin eyes Ukraine offensive. Eid ceasefire PAK-AFG. Updated 2026-03-21T00:00:00Z
